data.title: Broad Arrow is hosting an auction at Wynn Las Vegas on October 31, featuring collectible cars like Bugatti Veyron and Mercedes-Benz 300 SL Roadster, with a complete digital catalog now live.
data.description: The digital catalog for the upcoming October 31 auction is now available, featuring a range of valuable items. The inaugural sale highlights include the Bugatti Veyron EB 16.4 Coupe, the Mercedes-Benz 300 SL Roadster, along with many other modern collectibles. This auction presents an opportunity for enthusiasts to bid on exclusive items and potential investments. Interested participants can view the complete catalog online. Mark your calendars for a chance to acquire these sought-after items on October 31.

data.title: Regional bank stocks rebounded as better-than-expected earnings eased credit fears. SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF rose 1.1% after a 6.2% drop. Huntington Bancshares Inc. beat EPS estimate with 24.2% growth, reporting $2.13 billion in revenue, 13.9% higher than last year. Fifth Third Bancorp earned $0.93 per share, ahead of estimates.
data.description: Regional bank stocks bounced back on Friday after suffering steep losses the day before. The SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (NYSE: KRE) climbed 1.1% by 2 p.m. ET, following a 6.2% drop on Thursday, the largest decline since April. The rebound was fueled by strong earnings reports from small and mid-sized lenders, reassuring investors about earnings quality and credit trends. Several regional banks exceeded analysts' expectations, with Huntington Bancshares Inc. (NASDAQ: HBAN) reporting EPS of $0.41, surpassing the $0.37 estimate with a 24.2% year-over-year growth. Revenue reached $2.13 billion, a 13.9% rise from last year and 4.6% higher than forecasts. Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) also outperformed with earnings of $0.93 per share.

data.title: General Atomics collaborates with Japan and EU to tackle fusion energy challenge at JT-60SA tokamak.
data.description: In San Diego, experts at General Atomics (GA) are teaming up with Japan's National Institutes for Quantum Science and Technology (QST) and the European Union's Fusion for Energy (F4E) to tackle a key obstacle in fusion energy – maintaining the fuel that drives fusion reactions. They are collaborating to provide an advanced diagnostic system to the massive superconducting tokamak JT-60SA in Naka, Japan, the world's largest of its kind. This collaboration marks one of the initial steps in this endeavor.

data.title: University of Phoenix named to 2026 GSV 150 for digital learning success, from 3,000 global companies evaluated.
data.description: University of Phoenix has recently been included in the 2026 GSV 150 list, which showcases the most innovative growth companies in digital learning and workforce skills globally. With rigorous evaluation criteria such as revenue scale, growth, user reach, diversification, and margin profile, out of over 3,000 worldwide companies, University of Phoenix emerged as a leader in the industry. As per GSV, the integration of artificial intelligence in education is fundamentally transforming the global learning landscape.

data.title: Cryptocurrency prices drop as traders consider end of 4-year cycle. Retail enthusiasts impact recent decline.
data.description: A significant number of retail traders are believed to be adhering to the four-year Bitcoin cycle theory, contributing to the recent drop in cryptocurrency prices, according to experts.

data.title: Tommy John launches "Gift from the Hart" campaign with NY Knicks' Josh Hart for a cozy holiday season.
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, Tommy John, a top underwear and intimate apparel brand, has collaborated with New York Knicks' prominent player Josh Hart for their inaugural athlete-driven brand campaign. Released on October 17, 2025, the campaign aims to bring solace, self-assurance, and joy during the holiday period. This partnership marks a significant milestone for Tommy John as it delves into this new segment.
Brent crude futures settle at $61.29/bbl, up 23 cents, 0.38%.

data.title: Article discusses impact of self-driving cars on insurance industry; insurers face increased repair costs & liability shifts due to driver-assist tech.
data.description: In the October edition, Best’s Review explores the potential effects of autonomous vehicles on the insurance sector. While the World Economic Forum predicts full adoption of self-driving cars in private passenger auto in about 10 years, insurers are already experiencing changes. The introduction of partially automated vehicles with advanced driver-assist technology is providing insights into the future, including rising repair expenses and changes in legal responsibility.

data.title: AmEx stock in buy zone as earnings show growth, raised outlook. Indicates trend among luxury shoppers.
data.description: American Express has reentered a buy zone following a strong report indicating accelerated earnings growth and an improved outlook. The stock surged, rising above the buy point. The data suggests a positive trend among luxury shoppers.

data.title: Guidewire Software's Relative Strength Rating surpasses 80, indicating positive market momentum. [Character count: 98]
data.description: Guidewire Software has recently achieved a Relative Strength Rating exceeding 80. This increase in the RS rating indicates the stock's strong performance in comparison to the rest of the market. Such a rating boost is a positive sign for investors, signaling a potential opportunity for growth and profitability.

data.title: Law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP is investigating data privacy claims for PeopleGuru Holdings, Inc. due to a data breach on July 9, 2025.
data.description: Investigation into potential data privacy violations at PeopleGuru Holdings, Inc. is underway by the law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP, following a data breach incident discovered by PeopleGuru on approximately July 9, 2025. Individuals affected by this breach are encouraged to contact for further details.

data.title: Unichain launch boosts Uniswap to $6.20 before broader crypto market downturn; Bitcoin's 5% drop impacts DeFi tokens.
data.description: Uniswap's price has reached $6.20 following a temporary increase due to the Unichain L2 announcement. However, the overall DeFi token market is being negatively impacted by Bitcoin's 5% drop and concerns about inflation.

data.title: Veho expands to Michigan, Ohio, and North Carolina to serve 60 markets coast-to-coast; leading e-commerce delivery platform.
data.description: Veho, the customer-focused e-commerce delivery service in the U.S., has expanded its reach to 60 markets across the country. The platform now offers e-commerce brands the opportunity to provide customers with Veho-supported deliveries, ensuring efficient and reliable service. This development showcases Veho's commitment to enhancing the delivery experience for customers nationwide.
